author: IGN YouTube
text:
ReStory: Chill Electronics Repairs - 20 Minutes of Gameplay
ReStory: Chill Electronics Repairs is part of the "cozy" genre as it's a mix of Unpacking and something like TGC Card Simulator. You repair Y2K-era devices in your small shop, trying to stay on top of your bills while interacting with other locals. ReStory is being developed by Mandragora Studios, and you can download the demo now as part of Steam Next Fest.

#IGN #Gaming

author: IGN YouTube
text:
7 Burning Questions for the GTA 6 Pre-Order Launch - IGN Daily Fix
GTA 6 is coming! Rockstar has confirmed that pre-orders go live on June 25, which means we’re just a week away from finally getting some meaningful answers on what to expect when the most anticipated video game of all time arrives this November.
Once pre-orders open, we can expect to get answers for some of the biggest questions from not just fans, but the entire video game industry. With GTA 6, Rockstar has perhaps the biggest entertainment launch ever on its hands. This is a huge moment for the industry. What Rockstar and parent company Take-Two do in November could be a reset moment for video games, and setting up rival publishers to follow suit.
Here are seven burning questions for the pre-order reveal.
Presented by Universal Orlando Resort, and its newest theme park, Universal Epic Universe.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Order of the Sinking Star - 12 Minutes of Gameplay From Jonathan Blow's Next Puzzle Adventure
Order of the Sinking Star is the next game from Jonathan Blow, creator of Braid and The Witness. This time around you have rewind powers similar to the ones in Braid, and you're now controlling three characters as you solve puzzle after puzzle to progress through the overworld. You can download the demo now as part of Steam Next Fest.

text:
Aniimo - Official Gameplay Showcase
Don't miss the Gameplay Showcase for Aniimo, an upcoming free-to-play creature-collecting game developed by Pawprint Studio. Players will explore a vibrant world to seek unique Aniimo, learn new abilities, and embark on an epic journey. Take a look at gameplay, including cinematic cutscenes, gameplay, and more in Aniimo, coming soon to PlayStation 5 (PS5), Xbox Series X|S, iOS, Android, and PC (Steam and Epic Games Store).

#IGN #Gaming

text:
Embers of the Uncrowned - 11 Minutes of Questing Gameplay
Embers of the Uncrowned is an isometric MMORPG with PvP elements, town-building elements, and dungeon runs. It is being developed by Nexon, and you can download the demo now as part of Steam Next Fest.

text:
Casualties: Unknown - Full Run Gameplay
Get a feel for the upcoming survival sim, Casualties: Unknown, in this look at 16 minutes of gameplay, covering a full run from start to death. You can download the demo now via Steam Next Fest, with the full game being planned to release in 2026.

#ign #gaming

author: IGN YouTube
text:
GTA 6: The Road to Launch
Now that the cover art and pre-order date have finally been revealed in a new GTA 6 trailer, we dive into the what the road to November 19th looks like.   

We discuss GTA VI delays, special editions, launch times, price and what we can expect to see next. Will Rockstar show a GTA VI preview next? Gameplay? Only time will tell, but IGN will be here to breakdown all the GTA news!

#GTA6 #GrandTheftAuto6 #ign #gaming

author: IGN YouTube
text:
EMPULSE - 6 Minutes of Multiplayer Demo Gameplay (Full Match)
EMPULSE is a 6v6 FPS that is trying to capture the feel of Titanfall, complete with wall running and mechs. 1047 Games previously developed the Splitgate franchise. It hits Steam Early Access on June 24. You can download the demo now as part of Steam Next Fest.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Forza Horizon 6 - Official Porsche 911 Turbo S Leichtbau Trailer
Check out the Porsche 911 Turbo S Leichtbau Trailer for Forza Horizon 6, the latest addition of the hit arcade action racing game developed by Playground Games. The 1993 Porsche 911 Turbo S Leichtbau is the 80pt series reward car for Horizon Decades. Overcome challenges to earn rewards starting June 18 in Forza Horizon 6, available now for Xbox Series X|S, Xbox Cloud, and PC (Steam and Xbox on PC).

#ign #gaming

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Lootbound - Official Release Date Trailer
Take a look at the release date trailer for Lootbound, the tactical roguelite set in a dark fantasy world, where every run is built around loot, battles, party building, and decisions that can change the course of the game. Players start solo, meet companions along the way, choose routes and rewards, equip heroes and companions, and create builds through item synergies, damage types, and risk-reward choices.
Lootbound will be available on Xbox and PC (Steam) on July 31, 2026.

#ign #gaming

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Invincible VS - Official Universa Character Breakdown Video
Check out this latest Breakdown video for Universa, the latest fighter coming to Invincible VS. Boasting impressive range with her staff, and the ability to drain the opponent's boost meter, Universa looks set to shake-up the meta of the game. Boost meter heavy characters will certainly be sweating when Universa makes her debut in Invincible Vs Season 1 alongside The Immortal, on June 30th for PlayStation 5 (PS5), Xbox Series X|S, Xbox Cloud, and PC (Steam and Xbox on PC).

author: IGN YouTube
text:
The Division 2 - Official Into The Dark Narrative Cinematic Trailer
Check out the narrative trailer for The Division 2 Into the Dark update. The Hyena faction have tightened their grip on the streets of D.C., using their all new variant of Spice to their advantage. To push them back you must return to the most dangerous place in Washington D.C, The Dark Zone. 

Tom Clancy's The Division 2 Into The Dark Update is out now!

author: IGN YouTube
text:
The Vampire Lestat: Episode 103 Exclusive Clip (2026) Jacob Anderson, Sam Reid
In the new rock and roll centric season, the Vampire Lestat (Sam Reid) goes on an electric multi-city tour while being haunted by “muses” from his wild and rebellious past. As his band’s popularity and star power rises, so does Lestat’s influence over vampires and humans alike, leaving others to contend with Lestat’s power in the face of the Great Conversion, an unnatural surge in the vampire population. 

In addition to Reid, The Vampire Lestat stars Jacob Anderson, Assad Zaman, Eric Bogosian, Delainey Hayles and Jennifer Ehle and is executive produced by award-winning producer Mark Johnson, creator, writer and showrunner Rolin Jones, Hannah Moscovitch, along with Christopher Rice and the late Anne Rice.

Episode 103 (titled “Toronto”) premieres Sunday, June 21 on AMC and AMC+

author: IGN YouTube
text:
God Save Birmingham - Official Dev Update 3 Video
Don't miss this new developer update for God Save Birmingham! All new changes to combat and animations, paired with improvements to physics and of course, brand new weapons and weapon types! 

God Save Birmingham will be available on PC.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Best Way to Play Every Gears of War Game in 2026
A cornerstone of the third-person shooter genre, Gears of War has been gory and grimy comfort food for everyone who loves ultra-violence since its introduction in 2006. The series has greatly expanded in the 20 years since, and with all the re-releases, remasters, collections, and updates, it can be hard to parse the best way to play each game. Thankfully, we’ve booted them all up, and did the hard work for you. Here’s the best way to play each mainline Gears of War game on current-gen hardware. This includes Gears of War 1 (Original, Ultimate Edition, and Reloaded), Gears of War 2, Gears of War 3, Gears of War 4, and Gears 5.

Timecodes:
0:00 - Intro
0:38 - Platform Availability
1:37 - Performance Breakdown
4:27 - Cloud Streaming
4:43 - Steam Deck Status
4:57 - Best Way to Play Gears of War
5:23 - Best Way to Play Gears of War 2, 3, and Judgment
5:36 - Best Way to Play Gears of War 4
5:59 - Best Way to Play Gears 5
6:14 - Outro

Our guides:
Gears of War: Reloaded - DOMINATE Multiplayer With These Tips
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=lHgoZFoJElI

Gears of War - All 33 Cog Tag Locations
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=nDD7BmApKFA

Our Full Gears 5 Guide
https://www.ign.com/wikis/gears-of-war-5

#IGN #Gaming

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Fatal Fury: City of The Wolves - Official Kenshiro Character Trailer
The Fist of the North Star arrives to clean up South Town as Kenshiro arrives in Fatal Fury: City of The Wolves! Showcasing his mastery of Hokuto No Ken arts, Kenshiro hits hard and fast with moves that're imperceptible to the human eye! 

Kenshiro arrives in Fatal Fury: City of The Wolves this June for PlayStation 5 (PS5), PlayStation 4 (PS4), Xbox Series X/S, and PC (Steam and Epic Games Store).

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Moana - Official 'Along The Way' Behind the Scenes Clip (2026) Catherine Lagaʻaia, Dwayne Johnson
Take a look at the 'Along The Way' Featurette for Moana, a live-action reimagining of the animated film Moana. Take a look at the creation of the new original song for the live-action Moana that sees both the original Moana Auliʻi Cravalho, the live-action Moana with Catherine Lagaʻaia, and Dwayne Johnson join in on the track. Moana is in theaters on July 10.

In addition to Lagaʻaia and Johnson, the “Moana” cast includes Auckland, New Zealand, native John Tui as Moana’s no-nonsense father, Chief Tui; Samoan-New Zealander Frankie Adams, who portrays Moana’s playful and strong-willed mother, Sina; and Rena Owen, from Bay of Islands, New Zealand, as Moana’s revered Gramma Tala.

In Disney’s live-action reimagining of the beloved Oscar-nominated animated adventure, Moana (Catherine Lagaʻaia) answers the Ocean’s call and, for the first time, voyages beyond the reef of her island of Motunui with the infamous demigod Maui (Dwayne Johnson) on an unforgettable journey to restore prosperity to her people. 

The film is directed by Emmy and Tony Award winner Thomas Kail (“Hamilton”); produced by Dwayne Johnson, Beau Flynn, Dany Garcia, Hiram Garcia and Lin-Manuel Miranda; and executive produced by Thomas Kail, Scott Sheldon, Charles Newirth and Auliʻi Cravalho, who voiced Moana in the animated features “Moana” and “Moana 2.” 

Moana opens in U.S. theaters on July 10, 2026.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Every Detail in the GTA 6 Cover Art Explained
It's not trailer three, but the GTA 6 box art reveal is full of little clues about what to expect from the final game, including throwbacks to previous titles (including, obviously, GTA Vice City) and even some hints toward a Rockstar shared universe.

There could be nods to an extensive vehicle customisation system and even the reveal of a heist location. Either way, Rockstar is making a massive statement about the scope of GTA 6 ahead of pre-orders opening on June 25th: a game that will change Grand Theft Auto forever, but one that still revels in its own past.
